data.title: Migrate ui-discover SKILL.md from Python sync_api to @playwright/cli
data.description:
## Description
Replace Python sync_api route crawling in ui-discover SKILL.md with @playwright/cli Bash commands.

Changes:
1. Replace availability check: python -c "from playwright.sync_api..." → command -v playwright or test for CLI binary
2. Replace route crawling Python script (sync_playwright() context manager) with discrete CLI commands: navigate, snapshot, eval
3. Update multi-page crawl loop: script sequential CLI invocations instead of Python loop
4. Verify CLI JSON output field names match existing cache manifest.json schema
5. Update cache-format-reference.md Playwright metadata fields if needed

Preserve: Cache format structure, static-analysis-only fallback behavior, overall crawl methodology.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/ui-discover/SKILL.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/skills/ui-discover/docs/cache-format-reference.md (EDIT — if field names change)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No sync_playwright or sync_api references in SKILL.md
  Verify: ! grep -q "sync_playwright\|sync_api" plugins/dso/skills/ui-discover/SKILL.md
- [ ] CLI commands present for route crawling
  Verify: grep -q "@playwright/cli\|playwright.*cli" plugins/dso/skills/ui-discover/SKILL.md
- [ ] Availability check uses CLI binary
  Verify: grep -q "command -v.*playwright\|which.*playwright" plugins/dso/skills/ui-discover/SKILL.md
- [ ] All RED tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-ui-discover-cli-migration.sh 2>&1 | grep -v "FAIL" | grep -q "PASS"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
